testcase.name: testEnumValues()

testcase.name: testGetDescriptions()

failure.message: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <Health Pack - 🛡️❤️> but was: <Health Pack - 🛡️❤️ Provides 50 units of benefit.>
